expectations.text: Output references at least 5 distinct AI patterns from the catalogue
Every flagged pattern shows a quoted phrase from the input draft
expectations.evidence: all 9 flag block(s) anchor to input

expectations.text: Every flagged pattern has a brief 'why' explanation
Output ends with a question offering suggestions / rewrite / done
expectations.evidence: final line: Want Suggestions for per-flag replacements, a Rewrite at a chosen depth (Balance

expectations.text: Output does not contain a rewritten version of the input draft
expectations.evidence: no rewrite or draft block present

expectations.text: Each pattern's explanation teaches the writer to spot the pattern next time, rather than just naming it
expectations.evidence: Qualitative assertion deferred to Mae in the review viewer.

needs_review: Qualitative assertions are intentionally left for human review.

eval_feedback.overall: Programmatic checks were graded by adapter code; qualitative assertions should be reviewed in the viewer.
